name: Paintballer
description: "Moves towards tiles and shoots paintballs at them. Those who touch painted tiles will be slown until off of them.",
detail1: - Every ## seconds paintballer will go to a random tile near a player and paint it. If you're on a painted tile then you will be slowed
detail2: - Paintballer is a starting enemy and has a limit of 3 permanant Paintballers. Paintballer has no temporary cap.
deathmsg: "Victim was painted." "Victim got shot down by Paintballer." "Victim is now a different color." "Victim lost in a paintball fight." "Paintballer's aim is better than Victim's." "Paintballed, Victim." "Victim was PWNed by Paintballer." "Paintballer didn't even shoot and Victim still died." "Yep, Victim's dead." "Painted."
